good.human_notes: Honest about sparse reviews (1 review, rated 5). Pet-friendly correctly stated (PetFriendly IS in amenities). No invented attributes.
good.hero_headline: Stone Cottage with Log Fire near Hay-on-Wye
highlights: Enclosed garden and free parking on site
Ten minutes from the bookshops of Hay-on-Wye
good.about_this_place: Honeysuckle Cottage is a two-bedroom stone cottage on the edge of the Black Mountains, ten minutes from the bookshops and cafés of Hay-on-Wye. Curl up by the wood-burning fireplace after a day of walking, or take breakfast in the enclosed garden. Dogs are welcome. Sleeping up to four guests across two bedrooms and one bathroom. Full payment is due 14 days before arrival. Check-in from 4 PM, check-out 10 AM.

amenity_descriptions.label: Fireplace
amenity_descriptions.description: Wood-burning fireplace in the main living room.

amenity_descriptions.label: Garden
amenity_descriptions.description: Enclosed garden — ideal for morning coffee or afternoon reading.

amenity_descriptions.label: Free parking
amenity_descriptions.description: Free off-road parking at the cottage.

bad.human_notes: From a single 5-star review, extrapolates 'beloved by guests across the UK'. Also claims 'breathtaking Black Mountain views' not stated in the data.
intentional_failures: 'beloved by guests from across the UK' — overstates 1 review as a broad pattern
'breathtaking panoramic views of the Black Mountains' — data mentions proximity to the mountains, not views from the cottage
bad.hero_headline: Beloved Hay-on-Wye Cottage with Fireplace and Mountain Views
highlights: Beloved by guests from across the UK — consistently five-star rated
Breathtaking panoramic views of the Black Mountains
Crackling wood fire and an enclosed garden for complete relaxation
Perfect dog-friendly retreat, ten minutes from Hay-on-Wye
bad.about_this_place: Honeysuckle Cottage has won the hearts of guests from across Britain, earning glowing five-star praise for its perfect combination of rustic charm and countryside tranquillity. Perched on the edge of the Black Mountains, the cottage offers breathtaking views across the Welsh uplands. Two bedrooms sleep four, the wood-burning fireplace creates an instant sense of home, and the enclosed garden is a peaceful spot for your morning coffee — or your dog's morning run.

amenity_descriptions.label: Fireplace
amenity_descriptions.description: A characterful wood-burning fireplace that guests consistently describe as the highlight of their stay.

amenity_descriptions.label: Garden
amenity_descriptions.description: A beautiful enclosed cottage garden with views of the surrounding hills.

amenity_descriptions.label: Pet friendly
amenity_descriptions.description: Dogs warmly welcome — the garden and surrounding countryside are perfect for walks.
